title: Transmission Subsystem Dynamic Attributes
description: Dynamic attributes of the transmission, defining power output targets and gear signal output.

definition.description: Resource location of the subsystem model, pointing to the corresponding subsystem static attribute definition file.

power_output.description: Power output target, subsystem or part interface name.

gear_outputs.description: Gear name output channel and targets. Optional, by default sends current gear name to the gear channel of parts and vehicles.
